title: Auto Food Eater
description: Auto eats food in your hotbar when your hunger bar is low
body:
# **Auto Food Eater Mod (Minecraft)**

## **Overview:**
The Auto Food Eater Mod is designed to simplify survival gameplay in Minecraft by automatically consuming food items whenever the player's hunger drops below a certain threshold. This ensures that your character stays well-fed, healthy, and ready for any adventure, whether exploring caves, battling mobs, or engaging in intense PvP. Say goodbye to constant inventory checking and manual eating—this mod keeps you focused on the action while your hunger is managed automatically.

## **Key Features:**

Automatic Food Consumption: Instantly eats food from your inventory when hunger drops.

Customizable Thresholds: Set the hunger level at which the mod should trigger food consumption.

Support for All Edibles: Works with any edible item in Minecraft, including mods adding new foods.

Priority Management: Choose which food items the mod should consume first.

Safe for PvP & Survival: Keeps you alive in dangerous situations without interrupting gameplay.

Lightweight & Optimized: Minimal impact on game performance.

## **Advantages:**

Hands-Free Hunger Management: Focus on mining, fighting, or building without worrying about hunger.

Efficiency in Survival Mode: Reduces the risk of starvation during long expeditions or dangerous encounters.

Enhanced PvP Performance: Automatically keeps your health topped up, giving you a competitive edge.

Inventory Control: Smartly prioritizes the best food items, preventing waste of rare foods.

Perfect for Hardcore Mode: Helps prevent unexpected deaths from hunger.

Use Cases:

Exploration & Adventure: Keep your hunger full while exploring caves, dungeons, or new biomes.

PvP Battles: Focus on combat while the mod manages your health through food consumption.

Mining & Farming: Spend more time gathering resources and less time worrying about hunger.

Multiplayer Servers: Ideal for survival servers where constant attention to hunger can slow gameplay.

Conclusion:
The Auto Food Eater Mod is a must-have for players who want a seamless, uninterrupted Minecraft experience. By automating one of the game's essential mechanics, it makes survival easier, PvP smarter, and adventure more fun. Whether you’re a casual player or a hardcore adventurer, this mod ensures you’re always ready for anything
